name: Raspberry-Filled Chocolate Ravioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate over hot, not boiling water in a double boiler, then remove from heat and cool.
2. Cream butter and granulated sugar until blended in a large bowl.
3. Add egg, vanilla, chocolate extract, baking soda, salt, and melted chocolate; beat until light.
4. Blend flour into the mixture to form a stiff dough. Divide the dough in half and cover; refrigerate until firm.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Lightly grease cookie sheets or line with parchment paper.
7. Roll out one half of the dough between two sheets of plastic wrap, about 1/8 inch thick. Remove top sheet if it softens and sticks; refrigerate until firm.
8. Cut into 1 1/2-inch squares.
9. Place half the squares on prepared cookie sheets, spacing them 2 inches apart.
10. Add about 1/2 teaspoon raspberry jam to the center of each square and cover with another square.
11. Using a fork, press edges together to seal; pierce centers.
12. Bake for 10 minutes or until edges are lightly browned. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks. Dust lightly with confectioner's sugar. Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
